"And now, please give your attention to the opening

'Steel Ball Run' race, Mr. Steven Steel!"
"The cowboy from Wyoming, Mountain Tim! Atop his trusty
"The Mongolian master of horse-riding, Dot Han! His horse's
"The desert nomad, Urmd Avdul! He intends to race on the
camel! The same one he uses to cross the Sahara thrice a
"And now, appearing upon the the Silver bullet, with

"As for my dear distinguished guests, we will be observing

"Tim...? You're the man the announcer was talking about?"
"I suppose I am. I hope you don't feel deceived."
"I figured you'd doubt my sincerity back at the livery
yard if you knew I was competition."
"By the way, I heard you helped out a lot back in town. The
sheriff was thankful and so am I! You were a reliable ally."
"But from this point on, it looks like we'll be
"So don't expect any special treatment from me!"
"Well if you do, I understand. No hard feelings from me.
Just don't take it out on your horse. You rode them for
yourself after all. You know they're the real deal."
"Anyways, I'm sorry for now, but my sympathies end the
moment the starting shot goes off!"
(Johnny's horse, Slow Dancer, is licking his face...)
"The truth behind your 'steel ball'... I won't give up... I
will figure it out... It's in that 'Spin'...!"
"Even if I can't catch up to you... I will... someday...!"
"Choosing that horse was the right decision."
"Old horses have experience. In this kind of race, they
don't charge into dangerous territory on impulse and sprain
their legs. Unlike you young guys, who're all about
"Listen up, you're interesting, so I'll give you a hint."
"You've already found the answer. If you have the will to
get on the horse, why don't put it into action?"
(Gyro puts his hand on his steel ball.)
"It's now one minute to starting time! 3,652 participants
in total are on the beach!"
go between champion candidates and player
"We can't even see the end of the line!"
"...One more time fella... Lick my face one more time...!"
